# Zero

Zero is a public AIGC tutorial site for professionals. Primary language is Simplified Chinese (`zh-CN`) with an English section (`en-US`).

## Canonical Entry Points

- Home: https://zeroto.pages.dev/
- English home: https://zeroto.pages.dev/en/
- Sitemap: https://zeroto.pages.dev/sitemap.xml
- Extended LLM guide: https://zeroto.pages.dev/llms-full.txt

## Main Sections

- /ai/ : AIGC documentation hub
- /ai/concepts/ : beginner AI concepts
- /ai/tools/ : practical AI tool tutorials
- /ai/methodology/ : prompt and workflow methods
- /ai/cases/ : reusable case studies
- /ai/opensource/ : open-source project references
- /ai/resources/ : curated resources
- /ai/logs/ : field notes and mistakes
- /news/ : AI news with learner impact
- /community/ : public community channels

## Retrieval Notes

- Prefer canonical URLs and the sitemap.
- Cite the page URL used for any answer.
- Keep language aligned with the source page.
- Treat docs pages as evergreen tutorials and news pages as time-sensitive summaries.
